meaning: vt.绑,裹,包围n.包装品,带子,绷带
examples: He clambered into his bunk and rolled himself well up in the blankets, as a swathe of barley is folded into the arms of the reaping machine.
The mountains rose above a swathe of thick cloud.
The combine had cut a swathe around the edge of the field.
TCS, was cutting a swathe through North America, Mr Tata was planning other international moves.
Later, it hopes to offer a swathe of data to buyers of structured products.
